race.comment: THEBUDGIESMUGLA (5) much better effort second-up when he sat on the speed and gripped on to run fifth over 2100m at Gosford. Undefeated in two runs over this trip and loves getting his toe into the conditions. Expected to go close. THRICE (1) fitter now after disappointing the stable in his two Australian starts. Sat on the strong tempo with 60kg before tiring to run tenth over 2100m at Gosford. Claim helps again and gets another chance over this trip. DE LOUVIERE (10) consistent gelding who gets a much better set-up for this in his preferred conditions. Each way. CAP SAINT MARTIN (3) jumped in grade from a wide gate and never looked a chance when twelfth over 2100m at Gosford. Smaller field today and deserves another chance from the low gate. SAINT EMILION (9) snagged back early and never threatened when eleventh over 2100m at Gosford. Conditions suit and no shock to see him return to form.
